title: Udon Prison Breaks Under Luffy’s Will
description: On pages 6–9, this part focuses on Udon Prisoners, Unknown person #5, Caribou, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7, Unknown person #8 as Luffy turns Udon prison into the rebellion’s first major victory while Big Mom and Queen throw the prison into chaos.
scene: Luffy turns Udon prison into the rebellion’s first major victory while Big Mom and Queen throw the prison into chaos.

dialogue.speaker: Udon Prisoners
dialogue.text: Udd, prisoner's mine, control tower

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: NIN NIN NINN! NIN!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: All that ruckus out there has made my job in here quite easy!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I don't even know what this is all about!

dialogue.speaker: Caribou
dialogue.text: Caribou sure is reliable!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: "They're here!" or "they've gone this way!"

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Communica- Tions by the enemy are a big pain for us!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Listen. The telepathic system of the smart snails of wano

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Is their weakness!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: The network of snails goes like this.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Each snail sends its signals to a boss snail, of which there's only one per village!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: theeen, the boss snail sends that signal to other emails!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Whaddaya think would happen?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Don't tell me... Communications all across Wano would be cut off?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Riiiight you are!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I haven't just been staring at the wall in my time here, you knooooow... I even know where the boss snail is.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Leave the task of cutting off communica- Tions to me.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You've gotta secure the key to this plan, which would be the keys themselves! Steel 'em all and come find me, Raiza.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Oi! What's the matter?! Who did this?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Alert! Reporting in from B Tower-

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: My snail isn't working!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Just you wait, Kawamatsu! I will free you!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Here it is!:)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: My O-Shi- Ru-Ko!:)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: I found the pot!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: How sweet and rich a fragrance! Look at how much there is! ♥

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm so glad we came all this way!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: What do we do?! The pot's empty!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And what's she gonna do when she finds out?! What will she take out her anger on?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: We might just be slaugh- Tered!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Everyone, evacuate!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Save your- selves!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: An un- predictable disaster is about to be unleashed!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: I get how you're feelin' right now!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: I wanna have some again, too!

dialogue.speaker: Queen
dialogue.text: That Oshiruko sure was yummy!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Oi, ol, straw hat!

summary: This section advances the Wano - Udon Liberation storyline with 37 dialogue beats. Luffy turns Udon prison into the rebellion’s first major victory while Big Mom and Queen throw the prison into chaos.
